queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    brnd_name,
    gnrc_name,
    total_claims,
    total_drug_cost
from cms_portfolio.drug_list
where drug_key = '${params.drug_key}'
queries.inputQueryString:
select
    brnd_name,
    gnrc_name,
    total_claims,
    total_drug_cost
from cms_portfolio.drug_list
where drug_key = '${params.drug_key}'

queries.compiledQueryString:
select * from cms_portfolio.drug_prescribers
where drug_key = '${params.drug_key}'
order by total_claims desc
queries.inputQueryString:
select * from cms_portfolio.drug_prescribers
where drug_key = '${params.drug_key}'
order by total_claims desc
